title: psorospermum axillare
intro: Psorospermum axillare, also known as the yellow berberine tree, is a plant native to the tropical regions of Africa, Asia, and Australia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The plant's extracts have been found to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Psorospermum axillare, including tea and tinctures, are often used to promote overall well-being and combat infections.
